gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/305)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/305)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِذَا تَابَ الْعَبْدُ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً أَحَبَّهُ اللَّهُ فَسَتَرَ عَلَيْهِ فَقُلْتُ وَ كَيْفَ يَسْتُرُ عَلَيْهِ قَالَ يُنْسِي مَلَكَيْهِ مَا كَانَا يَكْتُبَانِ عَلَيْهِ وَ يُوحِي اللَّهُ إِلَى جَوَارِحِهِ وَ إِلَى بِقَاعِ الْأَرْضِ أَنِ اكْتُمِي عَلَيْهِ ذُنُوبَهُ فَيَلْقَى اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حِينَ يَلْقَاهُ وَ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ يَشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Musa Bin Al Qasim, from his grandfather Al Hassan Bin Rashid, from Muawiya Bin Wahab who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘When the servant repents with a sincere repentance, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Loves him, so He<sup>azwj</sup> Veils upon him’. So I said, ‘And how does He<sup>azwj</sup> Veil upon him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He<sup>azwj</sup> Causes His<sup>azwj</sup> Angels who used to Record upon him to forget, and He<sup>azwj</sup> Reveals unto his body parts and unto the spot of the earth that they conceal his sins upon him. Thus, he would meet Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic when he does Meet him, and there would be nothing to testify against him for anything from the sins’.
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Musa ibn al-Qasim from his grandfather al-Hassan ibn Rashid from Mu’awiyah ibn Wahab who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘When a servant (of Allah) repents in the form of the repentance of Nasuh (sincerely repenting) Allah loves him and covers him up.’ I then asked, ‘How He covers him up?’ The Imam said, ‘He makes his two angels forget whatever they have written against him and Allah sends inspiration to the parts of his body and to the parts of the earth to hide his sins and he will meet Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy in his meeting while there will be no one to testify anything against him for his sins.’”
